1757610.name: Puppet Master: The Game
1757610.description:
THE PUPPETS ARE BACK!


October Games and Full Moon Features proudly introduce Puppet Master: The Game!

This free-to-play online multiplayer game celebrates the series' 30-year legacy. Revisit iconic locations, select from a large roster of playable characters from the movies, and play a variety of online multiplayer game modes, each inspired by the Puppet’s many adventures.

FREE, NO STRINGS ATTACHED!

Enjoy our free-to-play multiplayer game without paywalls. All maps and characters are accessible for free. If you love it, consider supporting us with our cosmetic-only skin packs, each inspired by the Puppet Master film series!

ONLINE MULTIPLAYER

Unleash carnage across 4 game modes inspired by the film series!

(Thief COOP or 3vs1)
Flip the Asymmetrical Multiplayer Horror Game norm: play as a lone human against three sinister puppets. Survive as the human by stealing secrets of reanimation and escaping, or protect your master's secrets as the puppets. Unleash a pint-sized siege of terror!

(Manhunt 4vs2)
Two Human players must lift a curse and escape alive while fighting off an endless assault of heinous Puppets. Humans must stand near the Sutekh Idols to lift the curse.

(Puppet Master 4v4)
Three Good Puppet players defend one Human Player against a group of four Evil Totem Players! The Human must escape while the Good Puppets protect their Master!

(Puppet Wars 4v4)
In this Puppet-Only Game mode, two factions battle to determine the deadliest tiny terror. The first team to reach XP limit wins!

PUPPET MAYHEM

Play as a variety of malicious little fiends ripped straight from the film series, spanning iconic characters like Blade, Jester, and Six Shooter, as well as deep cuts from the franchise like the Totem and Mephisto. And officially, for the first time, the Puppets crossover with another twisted Full Moon Features franchise, Demonic Toys. Play as the foul-mouthed Baby Oopsie Daisy or the manic Jack-Attack and many more! It's pint-sized mayhem!

TOULON’S JOURNALS

A Sandbox Single Player mode where you can complete objectives and unlock pages of Andre Toulon’s Journal. Collect them all and listen to the Puppet Master’s journey throughout the series.

Written by Nat Brehmer the author of the Puppet Master Complete: A Franchise History.

THE PUPPET TRUNK

Craft your own team of tiny terrors! Play the game and earn XP to unlock iconic alternate looks from the series. Customize your weapons and express yourself with Emotes! Roll Perks to make your Puppet as deadly as they can be. Make each character your own!

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
